_comment: Engine-pin certificate. The pinned Factorio version (host-1 instance.json) MUST equal factorio_version below or lint-version-certification FAILS. STANDING LAB SUITE REMOVED 2026-07-19 (owner ruling): engine re-certification is a CALCULATED CAMPAIGN at version-update time. The evidence[] below is the 2.1.11 certificate (campaign 2026-07-20/21, branch fluid-segment-registry-21); the prior 2.0.77 certificate remains in git history at the pre-bump revision of this file, and the labs_archive_tag still points at the archived 2.0-era runners.

evidence.conclusion: The 2.1.11 fluid model measured and pinned: whole-segment writes read back exact from any member box (buffer/window duality removed); get_fluid capacity shares; plasma capacity-clamps and RIDES (engine_owned exclusion deleted by owner ruling); segment getters THROW on segmentless boxes (has_fluid_segment guard mandatory); fusion-generator boxes segmentless; 12-prototype fluid-box coverage sweep incl. the flamethrower-turret second-box drift 2.0.77->2.1.11 the instrument itself caught. ALL PASS 8/8, teardown clean, zero leftovers, live on 2.1.11.

evidence.lab: pads + transfer suite (standing coverage re-earned on the new pin)
evidence.conclusion: Every baked law re-verified live on 2.1.11: /test-run 19 passed / 0 failed / 0 missing (fusion-loop and thruster-pair join as ACTIVE fluid pads: plasma + buffered coolant + dual shared thruster segments ride copy/paste exactly); pad-transfer-suite ALL PASS repeatedly on the re-banked 2.1.11 golden pair (strict exact gate, gate-teeth sabotage fixtures, census-omission abort, force-bonus raise, rollback preservation all green through REAL transfers). Inserter held-seating and no-tick laws stand via the inserter-held-capacity and no-tick-sync-frozen-pair pads on the same roster.
The engine-fact backstops (incl. get_item_count completeness, the independent oracle behind the census enumerator) re-verified green on 2.1.11.

evidence.lab: belt behavioral coverage (offset law NOT re-isolated)
evidence.runner: tests/integration/belt-side-restore; tests/integration/belt-loss-replay (fixture re-exported by a current 2.1.11 source)
evidence.conclusion: HONEST PARTIAL: belt-side-restore (R11/R12 side-scoped recipe) and the 550-belt deficit replay run green on 2.1.11, and the atomic single-tick export scan + oversized-stack consolidation hold through the pad suite. The tier-parametric insert_at write-frame offset law (BELT-R10) and the 2.1 belt entries in version-compat PROFILES remain [hypothesis]-tagged best-effort carries - not re-isolated on 2.1.11. Re-isolate from the labs-archive tag before building anything new on the offset value.

game.delete_surface via GameUtils.delete_platform remains the deterministic removal route on 2.1.11 (the 2.0.77 destroy() drift that motivated the certificate is bypassed by design; lint:lua still blocks platform.destroy()).
